title: Drip vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Drip vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Drip and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Drip is built for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Businesses Wanting Deep Store Integration

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Drip wins for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Flodesk?
faq.a: Flodesk starts at a lower price point ($38/mo vs $39/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to Drip is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
